description_long: This is a compact, tactical-style rifle with a black metal body and a prominent cylindrical drum magazine mounted beneath the receiver. The rifle features a skeletonized, metallic stock with a padded buttplate, designed for lightweight support and easy maneuverability. The handguard is short and streamlined, with a simple iron sight system mounted along the top rail. The barrel is relatively short and ends flush with the handguard, lacking any visible muzzle device. The pistol grip is ergonomic and textured for secure handling, and the overall design suggests a focus on portability and rapid deployment. The finish is matte black, giving the rifle a modern, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, black tactical rifle with a drum magazine, skeletonized stock, and iron sights. Its design is modern and utilitarian, emphasizing portability and ease of use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular drum magazine and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, the skeletonized stock, and the drum magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the padded buttplate of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock structure.
